---
title: "David Masson,"
---

## David Masson,

**Dates:** (1822-1907)

### Description

literary critic

### Biography

He was professor of English at UCL from 1852, editor of Macmillan’s Magazine from 1859, and a prominent campaigner for women’s education and suffrage.

### Letters

- Letter from July 29th [1867] 
- Letter from July 24.1867.
- Letter from June 26. 1865
- Letter from June 23d [1865]
- Letter from May 4th 1865
- Letter from April 28.1865
- Letter from March 28. 1865
- Letter from March 25th 1865
- Letter from Novr 21st 1864
- Letter from July 30 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
